resources.string: Cannot open Task selector. Is the Tasker installed?

You can use those variables in a task that is triggered by NC:

 %ncpackage = package of the app that sent notification
 %ncid = ID of the notification
 %nctag = Tag of the notification
 %nctitle = Title of the notification
 %ncsubtitle = Subtitle of the notification
 %nctext = Text of the notification
